description:

Wow...

"Light" is actually describing its weight.
Fires absurdly precise and accurate shots.

One for each hand.

A bow but short.

A comcially short barrel gun.

description: A plug tied on a stick.

Hopefully doesn't cause blackouts.

description: A wand used by a shrine maiden.

description: The go-to for martial arts.

I studied the blade...

Kind of rusty. Great for getting 
into a flow.

name: CLEAVER

name: GLOVES

description:

Does wear on knuckles though.
name: BRASS KNUCKLES

description:
An axe that can hack, thrust, and pierce.
Being two-handed, it is quite heavy.
name: HALBERD

description:
A very long weapon, good for keeping distance.

name: PIKE

description:
A greater sword! It's sweeping hit makes
basic attacks hits all foes at lighter damage.

description:
Life-sized and huggable, yet suspicious. Any

description:

description:
Don't stick your finger in it!
Extreme ATTACK increase at a steep cost.

description:
Little girls in fighting games.
Gives same stat change as ANRGY.
name: STOP SIGN

description:
It's a sign!
Gives same stat change as HAPPY.
name: WARNING SIGN

description:
Spin my head right round. 20% JUICE damage and

description:
A horror movies' favourite.
Regular basic attack hits 3 times.
